data.title: Add dev-onboarding/design-onboarding offer step to onboarding SKILL.md to pass test-project-setup-onboarding-step.sh
data.description:
## Description

test-project-setup-onboarding-step.sh fails 8/9 assertions because onboarding/SKILL.md lacks a Step 7 equivalent that offers /dso:dev-onboarding and /dso:design-onboarding. The test expects:
- SC1: Step 7 heading present after Step 6
- SC2: Option descriptions with brief summaries of what each skill produces
- SC3: AskUserQuestion with 4 options when both skills available
- SC4: yes/no variant when only one skill available
- SC5: dev-onboarding invoked before design-onboarding in sequence
- SC6: skip option ends setup with no additional steps
- SC8a: references DESIGN_NOTES.md and ARCH_ENFORCEMENT.md for artifact detection
- SC8b: both artifacts present → prompt skipped entirely

### Files to modify
- plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md — add Step 7 block after Phase 3 Step 3 (or equivalent) offering dev-onboarding and design-onboarding with the structure the test expects

### Approach
Read test-project-setup-onboarding-step.sh to understand exact assertions, then add matching content to onboarding SKILL.md. The test already points to onboarding/SKILL.md.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/skills/test-project-setup-onboarding-step.sh passes with 0 failures (excluding RED zone)
  Verify: bash tests/skills/test-project-setup-onboarding-step.sh 2>&1 | grep -q "FAILED: 0"
- [ ] bash tests/skills/test-onboarding-skill.sh still passes (no regression)
  Verify: bash tests/skills/test-onboarding-skill.sh 2>&1 | grep -q "FAILED: 0"
- [ ] Step 7 heading present in onboarding SKILL.md
  Verify: grep -q "^## Step 7" plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md
